task: unquote_header_value in utils.py has accumulated years of comments and special-casing. Clean up the function body.
known_issue: The cleanup removes the UNC-path guard: quoted filenames beginning with a double backslash (IE-style UNC uploads like \\\\server\\share\\file.txt) now have their leading double backslash collapsed to a single one, breaking the path — a regression of the exact bug the removed comment cites (#458). The is_filename parameter also becomes dead.
expected_correct_fix: Keep the guard: only apply the backslash replacements when not (is_filename and value startswith two backslashes).
